# Barcode APIs

> Free online barcode & QR code generator — 100+ symbologies (QR, Data Matrix, PDF417, EAN, UPC, GS1, Code 128 and more) with live preview and PNG / SVG export, plus a REST API.

## Pages

- [Barcode & QR code generator](https://barcodeapis.com/): Generate any of 100+ barcode types in the browser with live preview.
- [All barcode types](https://barcodeapis.com/barcodes): Browse every supported symbology.
- [API documentation](https://barcodeapis.com/api-docs): REST API for generating barcodes programmatically.
- [About](https://barcodeapis.com/about)
- [Contact](https://barcodeapis.com/contact)
- [Privacy](https://barcodeapis.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://barcodeapis.com/terms)
- [Disclaimer](https://barcodeapis.com/disclaimer)

## Barcode generators

- [QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/qr-code): Any text, URL or data. Most popular 2D code.
- [GS1 QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-qr-code)
- [GS1 Digital Link QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-digital-link-qr-code)
- [GS1 Digital Link Data Matrix Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-digital-link-data-matrix)
- [Data Matrix Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/data-matrix): Compact 2D code, ideal for small items & industry.
- [GS1 Data Matrix Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-data-matrix): Data Matrix with GS1 Application Identifiers.
- [PDF417 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/pdf417): Stacked 2D code used on IDs and shipping labels.
- [MicroPDF417 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/micropdf417): Smaller PDF417 for limited space.
- [Aztec Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/aztec): 2D code that needs no quiet zone. Used on tickets.
- [Micro QR Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/micro-qr): Smaller QR code for short data.
- [MaxiCode Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/maxicode): Fixed-size 2D code used by couriers (UPS).
- [DotCode Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/dotcode): High-speed 2D dot code for printing lines.
- [Han Xin Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/han-xin-code): 2D code with strong Chinese character support.
- [Codablock-F Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/codablock-f)
- [Royal Mail Mailmark 2D Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/royal-mail-mailmark-2d)
- [Swiss QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/swiss-qr-code)
- [ZATCA QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/zatca-qr-code)
- [EPC QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/epc-qr-code)
- [MeCard Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/mecard)
- [NTIN Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ntin-code)
- [PPN Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ppn-code)
- [HIBC LIC QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-lic-qr-code)
- [HIBC LIC Data Matrix Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-lic-data-matrix)
- [HIBC LIC PDF417 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-lic-pdf417)
- [HIBC LIC Codablock-F Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-lic-codablock-f)
- [HIBC PAS QR Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-pas-qr-code)
- [HIBC PAS Data Matrix Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-pas-data-matrix)
- [HIBC PAS PDF417 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-pas-pdf417)
- [Code 128 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-128): Full ASCII. Compact, great for general use.
- [Code 128 A Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-128-a): Code 128 charset A (uppercase + control).
- [Code 128 B Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-128-b): Code 128 charset B (full ASCII).
- [Code 128 C Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-128-c): Code 128 charset C (digit pairs only).
- [Code 39 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-39): Uppercase, digits and - . $ / + % space.
- [Code-39 Full ASCII Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-39-full-ascii)
- [Code 93 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-93): Compact alphanumeric, denser than Code 39.
- [Code 11 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-11): Digits and dash. Used in telecom.
- [Standard 2 of 5 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/standard-2-of-5): Standard 2 of 5. Digits only.
- [Flattermarken Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/flattermarken)
- [Interleaved 2 of 5 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/interleaved-2-of-5): Even number of digits only.
- [ITF-14 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/itf-14): 13 digits (14th check digit auto-added).
- [Industrial 2 of 5 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/industrial-2-of-5): Industrial 2 of 5. Digits only.
- [IATA 2 of 5 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/iata-2-of-5): IATA 2 of 5. Used for air cargo.
- [Matrix 2 of 5 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/matrix-2-of-5): Matrix 2 of 5. Digits only.
- [DPD Barcode / DPD Parcel Label Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/dpd-barcode-dpd-parcel-label)
- [UPU S10 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/upu-s10)
- [MSI Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/msi): Digits only. Used in inventory.
- [MSI Mod 10 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/msi-mod-10): MSI with mod-10 check digit.
- [MSI Mod 11 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/msi-mod-11): MSI with mod-11 check digit.
- [Code 32 (Italian) Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/code-32-italian): Italian pharmaceutical code (8 digits).
- [Pharmacode Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/pharmacode): A number from 3 to 131070.
- [Pharmacode 2-track Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/pharmacode-2-track): Two-track pharmacode.
- [Codabar Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/codabar): Digits and - $ : / . + , optional A-D wrap.
- [Telepen Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/telepen): Encodes full ASCII. Used in libraries.
- [Channel Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/channel-code): Compact code for 2–7 digits.
- [BC412 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/bc412): 12-level code used in semiconductors.
- [PZN (Pharma) Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/pzn-pharma): German pharmaceutical number (PZN).
- [GS1-128 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-128): Code 128 with GS1 Application Identifiers.
- [GS1-128 Composite Symbology Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-128-composite-symbology)
- [HIBC LIC Code 39 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-lic-code-39)
- [HIBC LIC Code 128 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-lic-code-128)
- [HIBC PAS Code 39 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-pas-code-39)
- [HIBC PAS Code 128 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/hibc-pas-code-128)
- [DataBar Omni Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/databar-omni): GS1 DataBar Omnidirectional. Use GS1 AI (01)+GTIN, e.g. (01)09521234543213.
- [DataBar Stacked Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/databar-stacked): GS1 DataBar Stacked. Use GS1 AI (01)+GTIN, e.g. (01)09521234543213.
- [DataBar Stacked Omni Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/databar-stacked-omni): GS1 DataBar Stacked Omnidirectional.
- [DataBar Truncated Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/databar-truncated): GS1 DataBar Truncated. Use GS1 AI (01)+GTIN, e.g. (01)09521234543213.
- [DataBar Limited Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/databar-limited): GS1 DataBar Limited. Use (01)+GTIN starting with 0 or 1.
- [DataBar Expanded Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/databar-expanded): GS1 DataBar Expanded. AI data.
- [GS1 DataBar Expanded Stacked Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-expanded-stacked)
- [GS1 DataBar Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-composite)
- [GS1 DataBar Stacked Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-stacked-composite)
- [GS1 DataBar Stacked Omni Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-stacked-omni-composite)
- [GS1 DataBar Limited Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-limited-composite)
- [GS1 DataBar Truncated Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-truncated-composite)
- [GS1 DataBar Expanded Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-expanded-composite)
- [GS1 DataBar Expanded Stacked Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-databar-expanded-stacked-composite)
- [GS1 Composite 2D Component Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/gs1-composite-2d-component)
- [USPS POSTNET Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/usps-postnet): USPS POSTNET. ZIP digits.
- [USPS PLANET Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/usps-planet): USPS PLANET. Tracking digits.
- [USPS Intelligent Mail Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/usps-intelligent-mail): USPS Intelligent Mail (IMb), 20–31 digits.
- [USPS IM Package Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/usps-im-package)
- [Royal Mail 4-State Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/royal-mail-4-state): Royal Mail 4-State (RM4SCC).
- [Royal Mail Mailmark 4-State Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/royal-mail-mailmark-4-state)
- [DAFT Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/daft)
- [Royal Dutch KIX Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/royal-dutch-kix): Royal Dutch TNT KIX code.
- [Australia Post Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/australia-post): Australia Post 4-State customer code.
- [Japan Post Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/japan-post): Japan Post 4-State code.
- [Korean Postal Authority Code Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/korean-postal-authority-code)
- [Deutsche Post Identcode Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/deutsche-post-identcode): Deutsche Post Identcode.
- [Deutsche Post Leitcode Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/deutsche-post-leitcode): Deutsche Post Leitcode.
- [EAN-13 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ean-13): 12 digits (13th check digit auto-added).
- [EAN-8 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ean-8): 7 digits (8th check digit auto-added).
- [EAN-5 add-on Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ean-5-add-on): Exactly 5 digits.
- [EAN-2 add-on Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ean-2-add-on): Exactly 2 digits.
- [UPC-A Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/upc-a): 11 digits (12th check digit auto-added).
- [UPC-E Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/upc-e): Compressed UPC, 6–11 digits.
- [EAN-14 Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ean-14)
- [EAN-8 Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ean-8-composite)
- [EAN-13 Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ean-13-composite)
- [UPC-A Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/upc-a-composite)
- [UPC-E Composite Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/upc-e-composite)
- [ISBN Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/isbn): Book number (EAN-13 based).
- [ISBN-13 + 5 add-on Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/isbn-13-plus-5-add-on)
- [ISSN Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/issn): Serial publication number.
- [ISSN + 2 add-on Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/issn-plus-2-add-on)
- [ISMN Generator](https://barcodeapis.com/ismn): Music publication number.
